sourcesContent:
export const adminDashboardDesign = {
  colors: {
    primary:    '#4f46e5',
    primaryDark:'#4338ca',
    bg:         '#f8fafc',
    surface:    '#ffffff',
    text:       '#1e293b',
    textLight:  '#64748b',
    border:     '#e2e8f0',
    hover:      '#f1f5f9',

    overlay:    'fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 lg:hidden',
  },

  shadows: {
    sm: 'shadow-sm',
    md: 'shadow-md',
    lg: 'shadow-lg',
  },

  typography: {
    h1: 'text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900',
    h2: 'text-lg font-semibold text-slate-800',
    subtitle: 'text-sm text-slate-500',
  },

  transitions: {
    base: 'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out',
    fast: 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out',
  },

  layout: {
    wrapper: 'flex flex-col min-h-screen bg-slate-50',

    navbar:
      'h-16 flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 ' +
      'bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm z-30',

    body: 'flex flex-1 overflow-hidden',

    sidebar:
      'fixed lg:sticky lg:top-0 lg:z-20 ' +
      'inset-y-0 left-0 ' +
      'w-72 lg:w-64 xl:w-72 ' +
      'bg-slate-900 text-slate-200 ' +
      'flex flex-col ' +
      'transform lg:transform-none ' +
      'transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out ' +
      'lg:border-r lg:border-slate-800 ' +
      'overflow-y-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-slate-700',

    content:
      'flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-slate-50 ' +
      'p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8 xl:p-10 ' +
      'min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]',
  },

  navbar: {
    menuButton:
      'lg:hidden p-2 -ml-2 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 ' +
      'focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-md',

    title:
      'hidden lg:block text-xl font-semibold text-slate-800 tracking-tight',

    search:
      'w-full sm:w-72 lg:w-80 ' +
      'px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 ' +
      'bg-slate-50 text-sm placeholder-slate-400 ' +
      'focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 ' +
      'transition-all duration-200',

    avatarButton:
      'flex items-center gap-3 p-1.5 rounded-lg ' +
      'hover:bg-slate-100 active:bg-slate-200 ' +
      'transition-colors duration-150',

    avatar:
      'w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-500 to-indigo-700 ' +
      'text-white font-semibold flex items-center justify-center ' +
      'ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm text-sm',
  },

  dropdown: {
    wrapper:
      'absolute right-2 sm:right-4 top-14 ' +
      'w-64 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-slate-200 ' +
      'py-2 z-50 overflow-hidden',

    header:
      'px-4 py-3 border-b border-slate-100 ' +
      'flex flex-col gap-0.5',

    item:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm ' +
      'text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-indigo-700 ' +
      'cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-150',

    danger:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm ' +
      'text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700 ' +
      'cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-150',
  },

  sidebar: {
    header:
      'lg:hidden flex items-center justify-between ' +
      'px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-800',

    brand:
      'flex flex-col px-6 py-6 lg:hidden',

    logo:
      'text-2xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight',

    subtitle:
      'text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1',

    closeBtn:
      'lg:hidden text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl p-1 rounded-md ' +
      'hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors',

    nav: 'flex flex-col gap-1 mt-2 lg:mt-6 px-3',

    navItem:
      'flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium ' +
      'transition-colors duration-200 cursor-pointer ' +
      'hover:bg-slate-800/70 hover:text-white',

    navItemActive:
      'bg-indigo-600/20 text-indigo-400 border-l-4 border-indigo-500 font-medium',
  },
};
